google_dorks.name: ChatGPT Legacy Shared OpenAI API Keys
ChatGPT Private Keys
google_dorks.dork: site:chatgpt.com/share ("-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----" OR "-----BEGIN PGP PRIVATE KEY BLOCK-----")

google_dorks.name: ChatGPT Accidental Secret Disclosures
google_dorks.dork: site:chatgpt.com/share ("your secret is" OR "generated token:" OR "Here is your API key:")

google_dorks.name: Perplexity Internal Only Content
google_dorks.dork: site:perplexity.ai/search ("internal only" OR "do not distribute" OR "roadmap")

google_dorks.name: HuggingFace Spaces Debug Output
google_dorks.dork: site:huggingface.co/spaces ("Traceback (most recent call last)" OR "print(" OR "debug=")

social_media_dorks.name: X Mentions of AI Share Links with Secrets
social_media_dorks.dork: site:twitter.com ("chatgpt.com/share" OR "grok.com/share" OR "perplexity.ai/search" OR "huggingface.co/spaces") ("sk-" OR "password" OR "token")

social_media_dorks.name: Reddit Discussions About Leaked AI Shares
social_media_dorks.dork: site:reddit.com ("chatgpt.com/share" OR "grok.com/share" OR "perplexity.ai/search" OR "huggingface.co/spaces") ("leaked" OR "credentials" OR "api key")

social_media_dorks.name: Telegram Mentions of AI Share Leaks
social_media_dorks.dork: site:t.me ("chatgpt.com/share" OR "perplexity.ai/search" OR "huggingface.co/spaces") ("api key" OR "dump" OR "leak")

social_media_dorks.name: YouTube Walkthroughs of AI Leak Hunting

metadata_dorks.name: PDFs on ChatGPT Shares Referenced Externally
Office Docs Referencing AI Share Links
metadata_dorks.dork: site:{domain} (filetype:docx OR filetype:xlsx OR filetype:pptx) ("grok.com/share" OR "perplexity.ai/search" OR "huggingface.co/spaces")

metadata_dorks.name: Logs or JSON Referencing Tokens
metadata_dorks.dork: site:{domain} (filetype:log OR filetype:json OR filetype:txt) ("Authorization: Bearer" OR "ghp_" OR "hf_")

metadata_dorks.name: Config Files Linking To AI Shares
metadata_dorks.dork: site:{domain} (filetype:yml OR filetype:yaml OR filetype:env) ("chatgpt.com/share" OR "perplexity.ai/search")

linkedin_search_dorks.name: Company Posts Disclosing AI Prompting
linkedin_search_dorks.dork: site:linkedin.com/company/ ("ChatGPT" OR "Claude" OR "Perplexity" OR "HuggingFace Spaces") ("policy" OR "DLP" OR "secrets")
